tasks.name: Save two modern single-family homes under $550,000 and 1800–2500 sq ft to favorites
tasks.description: Find completed modern single-family home projects with sizes between 1800–2500 sq ft and estimated build cost under $550,000, then add the first two matching projects to your favorites list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Portfolio" or "Projects".
In the portfolio page sidebar or filter bar, click the "Type" filter and select "Single-Family Home".
Click the "Style" filter and select "Modern" from the style options.
Locate the size filter and set the minimum size to "1800 sq ft" and the maximum size to "2500 sq ft".
Locate the budget or cost filter and set the maximum estimated cost to "$550,000".
Click the "Apply Filters" button or equivalent to update the project list.
From the filtered results, click the first project card to open its detail page, then click the "Add to Favorites" or "Save Project" button.
Use the browser back function or the "Back to Portfolio" link to return to the filtered project list.
From the same filtered results, click the second project card and again click the "Add to Favorites" or "Save Project" button.

tasks.name: Request a quote for a similar 2022 kitchen renovation costing between $40,000 and $80,000
tasks.description: Locate a kitchen renovation project completed in 2022 with a budget between $40,000 and $80,000, then use the “Request a similar project” form on that project’s page to submit a quote request.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Portfolio", then in any category options select "Renovations" or "Remodels".
Use the category or room-type filter to select "Kitchen" renovations.
Use the year or completion date filter to select projects completed in the year "2022".
Use the budget or cost range filter to set a minimum of "$40,000" and a maximum of "$80,000", then apply the filters.
From the filtered list, click on the first project that appears to open its detail page.
On the project detail page, locate and click the button or link labeled "Request a Similar Project" or "Get a Quote for a Similar Renovation".
In the quote request form, type "Alex Sample" in the name field and "555-123-4567" in the phone field.

In the budget field, enter "$60,000" as your target budget and in the message or description field type "I would like a kitchen renovation similar to this project, with an island and updated appliances."
In the preferred start date field, select a date three months from today’s date (for example, if today is March 3, 2026, select June 3, 2026), then click the "Submit" or "Send Request" button.

tasks.name: Choose the cheaper of two 3-bedroom house plans under 2000 sq ft and start a consultation
tasks.description: From the pre-designed house plans section, find two plans with exactly 3 bedrooms and under 2000 sq ft, compare their estimated build costs, then start a consultation request specifically for the cheaper plan.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Plans", "Pre-Designed Homes", or similar.
In the filters for plans, set the bedrooms filter to "3 bedrooms".
Set the maximum size filter to "2000 sq ft" and apply the filters.
Scroll through the results and click on the first plan that meets the criteria to open its detail page, then note its estimated build cost displayed on the page.
Use the navigation or back function to return to the filtered plans list and click on the second plan in the list to open its detail page, then note its estimated build cost.
Compare the two recorded estimated build costs and decide which plan is cheaper.
While viewing the detail page of the cheaper plan, click the button labeled "Schedule Consultation", "Talk to an Architect", or similar.
In the consultation form, type "Jordan Buyer" in the name field and "jordan.buyer@example.com" in the email field.

In the message field, type "I am interested in this 3-bedroom plan because it is more affordable than the other similar option. Please contact me to discuss customization." and then click the "Submit" or "Request Consultation" button.

tasks.name: Use the cost calculator to estimate a 2200 sq ft modern home and request a detailed estimate
tasks.description: Use the website’s cost calculator for a custom home: configure a 2200 sq ft modern home with 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, mid-range finishes in ZIP code 94110, then submit a request for a detailed estimate using the provided form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Services" and then select "Custom Home Design" or a similar custom home service.
On the service page, locate and click the "Cost Calculator", "Estimate Your Build", or similar tool.
In the calculator, enter "2200" as the total square footage and select "Modern" from the style dropdown.
Set the bedrooms field to "3" and the bathrooms field to "2" using the available controls.
From the finishes or quality dropdown, select the "Mid-range" option.
In the location or ZIP code field, type "94110" and click the "Calculate", "Update Estimate", or equivalent button.
After the estimate is displayed, click the button labeled "Request Detailed Estimate", "Get Full Quote", or similar located near the calculator.
In the form that appears, type "Taylor Planner" in the name field and "taylor.planner@example.com" in the email field.
In the project description or notes field, type "Please provide a detailed estimate for this 2200 sq ft modern home with mid-range finishes in ZIP 94110." and click the "Submit" or "Send" button.

tasks.name: Save three 2023 sustainability-focused articles to a reading list
tasks.description: Browse the blog or resources section, filter for sustainability-related content published in 2023, then add the first three qualifying articles to a built-in reading list or saved items feature.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Blog", "Resources", or "Insights".
On the blog/resources page, click the topic or tag filter and select "Sustainability", "Green Building", or similar sustainability-related tag.
Click the date or year filter and select "2023" as the publication year, then apply the filters.
From the filtered article list, click on the first article to open it, then click the "Save", "Add to Reading List", or "Bookmark" button associated with the article.
Return to the filtered article list using the site’s navigation or back function, then open the second article and again click the "Save", "Add to Reading List", or "Bookmark" button.
Repeat the same process for the third article in the list: open it and then click the "Save", "Add to Reading List", or "Bookmark" button.
After saving the three articles, click on the "Reading List", "Saved Articles", or equivalent link or icon in the header or sidebar to open your saved items page.
On the saved items page, locate the three articles you saved and click on one of their titles to reopen it from the reading list.

tasks.name: Find a high-budget urban infill testimonial mentioning communication or timeline and copy its link
tasks.description: Browse client testimonials to find one for a project with a budget over $800,000 in an urban infill or city lot context that mentions either communication or timeline, then use the testimonial’s built-in share or copy-link feature.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Testimonials", "Reviews", or "Client Stories".
Use any available filter for project type or context and select "Urban Infill", "City Lot", or the closest matching option.
Use a budget or project size filter, if available, to select projects with a budget over "$800,000" or choose the highest budget range provided.
Scroll through the filtered testimonials and click on the first testimonial preview that mentions "communication" or "timeline" in its summary text.

On the testimonial’s detail view, read the full text to confirm it references either communication or project timeline, then locate the "Share", "Copy Link", or similar button associated with that testimonial.
Click the "Share" or "Copy Link" button and, if a menu appears, choose the "Copy Link" or "Copy URL" option.
Navigate to any "Contact" or "Get in Touch" page using the site’s header navigation.

In the general inquiry form on the contact page, paste the copied testimonial URL into the message field and type the message: "This testimonial reflects what I’m looking for. I’d like a similar project." before clicking the "Submit" button.

tasks.name: Book an in-studio consultation for a custom home on a specific date and time slot
tasks.description: Use the booking or consultation scheduling feature to reserve an in-studio consultation for a custom home project on a specified date next month at a 3:00 PM time slot.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Contact", "Consultation", or "Book a Meeting".
On the consultation page, click the button labeled "Book In-Studio Consultation" or similar to open the scheduling interface.
In the appointment type dropdown, select "Custom Home Consultation" if multiple types are listed.
Use the date picker to select a date exactly one month from today’s date (for example, if today is March 3, 2026, select April 3, 2026).
In the available time slots for that date, select the "3:00 PM" time slot or the closest available time that starts with 3:00 PM.
Enter "Morgan Client" in the name field and "morgan.client@example.com" in the email field.
In the project details or notes field, type "I’d like to discuss a new custom home project on a narrow city lot."
Click the "Confirm Booking", "Schedule", or equivalent button to finalize the consultation request.

tasks.name: Find the most expensive commercial project built after 2019 and inquire about it
tasks.description: Filter commercial projects completed after 2019, sort them by cost from highest to lowest, open the most expensive one, and submit an inquiry specifically referencing that project.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Portfolio" or "Projects" and, if categories are shown, select "Commercial".
Use the completion date or year filter to select projects completed from "2020" onward, then apply the filter.
Locate the sort dropdown and select "Cost: High to Low" or the closest option that orders projects by highest budget first.
Click on the first project in the sorted list to open the detail page for the most expensive recent commercial project.
On the project detail page, copy or note the project name as displayed in the project title area.
Locate and click the button labeled "Ask About This Project", "Inquire", or similar.
In the inquiry form, type "Riley Investor" in the name field and "riley.investor@example.com" in the email field.

In the message field, type "I am interested in a commercial project similar to [PROJECT NAME]. Please provide information on timelines and budget." and replace [PROJECT NAME] with the exact project name you noted, then click the "Submit" or "Send Inquiry" button.
